chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1705 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge PRIORITY. 1. For orders on Misc. No. 8694 of 2024 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 7721 of 2024 3. For hearing of main case. 30.04.2024 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent No.2 Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, AAG. Mr. Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent No.3. ---------------------------- Learned counsel for the Petitioner seeks urgency prima facie there seems no ground for seeking urgency as the matter is already fixed for 17.04.2024 as date by Court, however, today Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate has shown appearance, files comments along with annexures on behalf of Respondent No.2 and submits that instant Petition is misconceived and not maintainable, whereas, request of the Petitioner is the amendment in the IGM, has already been declined and an FIR has been registered against the Importer and the matter is pending before the adjudication Peshawar. Such comments are taken on record. In view of the facts and circumstances of the case, instant Petition is disposed of with directions to the Petitioner to seek appropriate remedy before the appropriate forum in accordance with the law. CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Jamil
